data.title: Arlo Solutions appoints ex-U.S. Air Force CIO Venice Goodwine as CIO on 27-Jan-2026, per PR Newswire correction.
data.description: Arlo Solutions has announced the appointment of Venice Goodwine as their new Chief Information Officer. Goodwine, a former U.S. Air Force CIO, brings a wealth of experience to the role. The news was released on January 27, 2026, via PR Newswire. This change marks a significant move for the company, showcasing their commitment to enhancing their leadership team.

data.title: Braemar Hotels & Resorts reports tax info for 2025 distributions on common and preferred shares, including Federal Form 1099-DIV.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) disclosed the tax reporting details for the 2025 distributions on its common shares and various preferred shares. The company shared the information required for Federal Form 1099-DIV related to its Series B, D, E, and M preferred shares, outlining the specific amounts distributed.

data.title: Ashford Hospitality Trust discloses tax info for 2025 preferred share distributions (Series D-M); Forms 1099-DIV were issued.
data.description: In Dallas today, the company Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) shared details regarding the tax reporting (Federal Form 1099-DIV) for the distributions made in 2025 on its preferred shares Series D, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, and M. The provided data includes important information on the amounts distributed during the year, offering clarity to shareholders for tax purposes.

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. announces Q4 2025 results. Company is the holding company for Ponce Bank, N.A.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Ponce Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PDLB), the parent company of Ponce Bank, N.A., disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Princess Hotels & Resorts Jamaica's Princess Senses the Mangrove to reopen Feb. 1 with a limited-time grand opening offer.
data.description: Princess Hotels & Resorts Jamaica announced that Princess Senses the Mangrove will reopen on February 1, 2026, to celebrate Jamaica's resilience. The limited-time grand opening offer includes special deals. This news was released on January 27, 2026, with updates from the company regarding the reopening plans.

data.title: Correction: BridgeBio Pharma issues inducement grants under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) on Jan. 27, 2026; incorrect figures in previous version.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, a press release from BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBIO) in Palo Alto, California, contained errors in the initial figures provided. The corrected information is now being issued.

data.title: Libra Industries leads in nationwide PPE cleaning & recycling amid rising costs and sustainability demands.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan, on January 27, 2026, Libra Industries is at the forefront of the industry in providing glove and PPE cleaning services across the United States. With mounting pressure on organizations due to escalating PPE costs, supply chain disruptions, and growing sustainability demands, Libra Industries stands out for its leadership. The company addresses these challenges by offering nationwide cleaning services for gloves and PPE, catering to the increasing needs of businesses.
MF: – IMF EXECUTIVE BOARD COMPLETES SIXTH REVIEW UNDER THE EXTENDED CREDIT FACILITY WITH ZAMBIA

data.title: Provident Financial Services, Inc. reports Q4 net income of $83.4M, annual net income of $291.2M for 2025. No merger costs in 2025.
data.description: Provident Financial Services, Inc. reported a net income of $83.4 million for the three months ended December 31, 2025, compared to $71.7 million in the previous quarter and $48.5 million in the same period in 2024. For the year ending December 31, 2025, net income was $291.2 million, a significant increase from $115.5 million in 2024. The company merged with Lakeland Bancorp, Inc. in 2024, leading to transaction costs totaling $117.0 million, with no such costs in 2025. The 2024 full-year results included a Current Expected Credit Loss provision for credit losses on loans of $60.1 million.

data.title: Gouverneur Bancorp, Inc. reports fiscal 2026 first quarter results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Gouverneur, New York, Gouverneur Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB: GOVB), the parent company of Gouverneur Savings and Loan Association, revealed its financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on December 31, 2025.

data.title: CGI Franchise introduces enhanced Recruitment Operating System (ROS) Reporting Program™ for better franchise reporting.
data.description: A prominent franchise development company, CGI Franchise, has introduced its improved Recruitment Operating System (ROS) Reporting Program™. This innovative system marks a remarkable milestone in franchise reporting by offering enhanced tools for brands aiming for substantial growth.

data.title: U.S. physicians call on HHS Sec. RFK Jr. to modernize USPSTF for proactive, science-driven prevention, reducing preventable illness and death.
data.description: Prominent doctors and researchers from various states are advocating for RFK Jr. to update the US Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF). They emphasize the need for a proactive approach based on scientific evidence to enhance prevention measures and early detection of diseases. Their aim is to decrease preventable illnesses, premature deaths, health disparities, and unsustainable healthcare costs.

data.title: Scent Of Rain Ministries INC launches new website in Warner Robins, GA focused on empowering individuals.
data.description: SORM, a nurturing organization, aims to support people in their personal growth journey. The group is committed to inspiring individuals to achieve their maximum capabilities and improve themselves. A recent event held in WARNER ROBINS, Ga. on January 27, 2026, emphasized the importance of unity with strength, as mentioned in John 13:35 KJV.

data.title: Atomera's GaN-on-Silicon concept progresses in funding program, moving to proposal stage for WBG power semiconductor tech.
data.description: In Los Gatos, California, Atomera Incorporated, a company specializing in semiconductor materials and technology licensing, revealed that their paper on Gallium Nitride on Silicon (GaN-on-Si) technologies has progressed to the proposal stage within the PowerAmerica Institute Initiated Proposal (IIP). This advancement aims to enhance wide-bandgap (WBG) power semiconductor technology. The proposal includes plans for collaboration with industry and scientific partners. Atomera's concept paper on GaN-on-Si technologies has been accepted for further development, signifying a step forward in advancing semiconductor innovations.

data.title: Astranis and MB Group partner for Oman's first MicroGEO satellite, expanding broadband capacity in the Middle East.
data.description: Astranis, a top provider of small geostationary communication satellites, has joined forces with The MB Group, a prominent conglomerate in Oman, to establish Oman's initial dedicated MicroGEO satellite. The satellite is set to be included in Astranis' Block 3 launch scheduled for the upcoming year. This partnership signifies a notable advancement in satellite broadband capabilities throughout crucial markets in the Middle East, offering dependable and high-speed connectivity.

data.title: Air Products raises quarterly dividend to $1.81 per share, marking 44th straight year of increases.
data.description: For the 44th consecutive year, Air Products (NYSE: APD) has raised its quarterly dividend on common stock to $1.81 per share. This long-standing trend signifies the company's commitment to providing returns to shareholders. The latest increase underlines the financial stability and growth prospects of Air Products, reinforcing investor confidence in the company's performance.

data.title: Silvercorp Metals Inc. (TSX/NYSE: SVM) finalized the acquisition of Tulkubash/Kyzyltash Gold Projects in Kyrgyzstan.
data.description: Stock Symbols: SVM on TSX and NYSE American VANCOUVER, BC, Jan. 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Silvercorp Metals Inc. (TSX: SVM) (NYSE American: SVM) ("Silvercorp" or the "Company") has finalized the acquisition mentioned in its Jan. 20, 2026 release. The company is pleased to confirm the completion of this acquisition.

data.title: Tampa General Hospital and USF Health College to host "Microbes, Genes & Cancer" Symposium on March 2-3, 2026. Internationally recognized experts from various cancer-related disciplines to attend. TAMPA, Fla., Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Scheduled to take place on March 2-3, 2026, a conference in Tampa will showcase experts from multiple scientific cancer-related fields. Organized by the Tampa General Hospital (TGH) Cancer Institute and the USF Health Morsani College of Medicine, the event will welcome renowned professionals to share their expertise.

data.title: KENT® Nutrition's ARGIS® probiotic wins IPPE Best of the Best Award for Animal Food category at IPPE 2026.
data.description: In Muscatine, Iowa, KENT® Nutrition is marking a significant achievement as its ARGIS® probiotic has been recognized as a Best of the Best Award recipient in the Animal Food category at the International Production & Processing Expo (IPPE) 2026 in Atlanta, GA. This prestigious award acknowledges outstanding innovation and influence within the animal agriculture sector. Chosen as a winner in a rigorous competition, ARGIS stood out among other exhibitors and secured the top spot.

data.title: ROHM introduces LDO regulators with 500mA output, enabling stable operation with ultra-small capacitors for high-current applications.
data.description: Enhances Options for High-Current Applications by Offering Increased Design Flexibility.
